title: The Christmas Toy Factory
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: When Santa catches the measles, Geronimo must fly the reindeer and deliver every Christmas toy — and learn what the holiday is really about! 🎄

q.en: Why did Santa Claus ask Geronimo to deliver the Christmas toys?
q.zh: 圣诞老人为什么请杰罗尼摩去送圣诞玩具？

options.en: Santa had come down with the measles
The elves went on strike according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 小精灵罢工了（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Santa told Geronimo he had come down with the measles on his busiest night, so he could not deliver the toys himself.
explain.zh: 圣诞老人告诉杰罗尼摩，他在最忙碌的晚上染上了麻疹，所以没法亲自去送玩具。

options.en: The mayor of New Mouse City according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 新老鼠市的市长（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A reindeer with a red nose
An elf sent by Santa to fetch Geronimo
options.zh: 圣诞老人派来接杰罗尼摩的小精灵

explain.en: Ding-Dong is a chubby elf with a tiny beard who tumbles in through the fireplace; Santa sent him to bring Geronimo to the North Pole.
explain.zh: 丁咚是一个留着小胡子的胖精灵，从壁炉里滚了进来；是圣诞老人派他去把杰罗尼摩接到北极的。

q.en: What did Benjamin ask Santa for in his letter?
q.zh: 本杰明在给圣诞老人的信里要了什么？

options.en: A box of chocolates according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一盒巧克力（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: More time with his uncle Geronimo
options.zh: 更多和叔叔杰罗尼摩相处的时间

explain.en: Benjamin's letter said he did not want presents; he most wanted his uncle Geronimo to spend more time with him.
explain.zh: 本杰明的信里说他不要礼物，他最想要的是叔叔杰罗尼摩能多陪陪他。

q.en: What is Grandfather William Shortpaws's favorite saying?
q.zh: 威廉·短爪爷爷最爱说的一句话是什么？

options.en: Early to bed, early to rise
All work and no play makes a mouse rich, rich, rich!
options.zh: 只工作不玩耍，老鼠发财发到家！

options.en: A friend in need is a friend indeed according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 患难见真情（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Grandfather William, also called Cheap Mouse Willy, always says 'All work and no play makes a mouse rich, rich, rich!'
explain.zh: 大家又叫他‘吝啬鼠威利’的威廉爷爷，总把‘只工作不玩耍，老鼠发财发到家！’挂在嘴边。

q.en: According to the book, where does Santa Claus live?
q.zh: 根据书里的说法，圣诞老人住在哪里？

explain.en: The book's Santa legend says Santa lives in Rovaniemi, Finland, and his secret house is at Korvatunturi, the 'Ear Mountain'.
explain.zh: 书里的圣诞传说写道，圣诞老人住在芬兰的罗瓦涅米，他隐秘的房子在科瓦通图里，也就是‘耳朵山’。

q.en: Which of Geronimo's friends loves bananas?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的哪位朋友最爱香蕉？

options.en: Burt Burlyrat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 伯特·壮鼠（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: When Hercule Poirat sprang out of the package he shouted 'I love bananas! B-a-n-a-n-a-s!'
explain.zh: 赫拉克·波拉从包裹里蹦出来时大喊‘我爱香蕉！B-a-n-a-n-a-s！’

q.en: How many reindeer pull Santa's famous sled?
q.zh: 圣诞老人那架著名的雪橇由多少只驯鹿牵引？

explain.en: The book shows Santa's sled is pulled by his faithful reindeer team, and Geronimo rides in a sleigh pulled by nine prancing reindeer.
explain.zh: 书里描写圣诞老人的雪橇由忠实的驯鹿队牵引，杰罗尼摩坐的雪橇正是由九只欢蹦乱跳的驯鹿拉着的。

q.en: Who fell through the ice on the frozen lake and was saved by Geronimo?
q.zh: 谁掉进冰湖里被杰罗尼摩救了上来？

options.en: Santa Claus according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 圣诞老人（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Ding-Dong was twirling on the frozen lake when the ice cracked; Geronimo slid out and pulled him out with his belt.
explain.zh: 丁咚在冰湖上转圈时冰面裂开，杰罗尼摩爬过去用皮带把他从冰水里救了上来。

q.en: Which famous chef made the cheesy lasagna at Geronimo's Christmas party?
q.zh: 在杰罗尼摩的圣诞派对上，是哪位名厨做了芝士千层面？

explain.en: Geronimo's good friend Saucy Le Paws, one of the most famous chefs on Mouse Island, whipped up a super fabumouse cheesy lasagna.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩的好友索西·勒波是老鼠岛上最有名的厨师之一，他在派对上做了一大盘超级美味的芝士千层面。

q.en: What big problem did New Mouse City face at the end of the story?
q.zh: 故事结尾新老鼠市遇到了什么大麻烦？

options.en: A mouse escaped from the zoo according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 动物园跑出一只老鼠（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A big snowstorm buried the city in snow
options.zh: 一场大暴雪把整座城市埋进了雪里

explain.en: After the party, a huge blizzard left five feet of snow and paralyzed the city, so the mayor asked every mouse to grab a shovel.
explain.zh: 派对之后一场大暴雪积了五英尺厚的雪，整座城市瘫痪，于是市长号召每只老鼠都拿起铲子去铲雪。
